items.name: ZeroOne
items.description: Managed platform for creating and deploying AI agents via dashboard, no DevOps required. Multi-channel and multi-model. One-click deployment, custom agent identity/persona/memory, visual dashboard, live status monitoring. Each agent runs in a separate Docker container, completely isolated from the main server.

items.name: ZeroMarket
items.description: WASM skill registry for ZeroClaw — browse, install, and publish WebAssembly tool packages for agents. One-click install via zeroclaw skill install namespace/skill-name. Multi-language support (Rust, TypeScript, Go, Python). Visual registry with search, filter, and drag-and-drop publish. Each skill runs in WASM sandbox, isolated from the host.

items.name: ZeroBuilder
items.description: Telegram-native web application builder — build production-quality web apps through natural chat, no setup required. Plan-before-build workflow: agent proposes a structured plan, waits for confirmation, then builds. E2B MicroVM sandboxes, live preview URL, GitHub OAuth deploy. Master Agent (ZeroClaw Rust) + Builder Agent (Node.js, E2B).

items.name: MobileClaw
items.description: Open-source ZeroClaw for Android devices, including automotive. Fast, small, fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure. Turns old Android phones into on-device control centers. Rust-first core, modular providers/channels/tools, 22+ providers, Telegram/Discord support. APK from GitHub Releases.

items.name: MoreAura.ai
items.description: Aura connects your email, calendar, and pipeline — then handles the busywork so you can operate.
